title: BlockOffensive
description: BlockOffensive is a Counter-Strike-inspired mod that turns Minecraft into a tactical team-based shooter. It features bomb planting/defusal objectives, a round-based economy system, and specialized item for competitive gameplay.
body:
## Description  
BlockOffensive that brings classic Counter-Strike gameplay into the world of Minecraft. It delivers a full tactical FPS experience, featuring team-based combat between Counter-Terrorists (CT) and Terrorists (T), bomb planting and defusing mechanics, a weapon shop system, and round-based match mode.

Built on the FPSMatch framework, the mod incorporates a modern user interface and includes an economy system, specialized equipment (such as C4 bombs and defuse kits), a voting system, MVP awards, and team-switching functionality. By maintaining compatibility with weapon mods like TACZ (Timeless and Classics Zero), BlockOffensive offers an authentic tactical shooting experience that blends the creativity of the block-based world with the thrill of competitive FPS.

## Images
![CT SHOP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cd6db311c8f7385c30f18779372a62917b5d278.png)
![T SHOP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84f6b15af9986032e111a6377bb1b73f161bfaad.png)![InGame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0eff6a5a3112560ad607dd20cf8d6e3d37073f3.png)![Demolish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75373b49013ba046f0ee35ded7fa6fece884a93a.png)

## Notes  

This mod is released under the GPL v3 open-source license and is developed and maintained by SSOrangeCATY. It relies on ModernUI for an enhanced user interface and supports optional compatible mods such as physics mods and damage indicators to further improve the gameplay experience.
